prompt: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic vertical portrait of a stylish young female social media influencer sitting confidently on top of a giant glowing Facebook logo cube in a futuristic neon-blue environment. She has long wavy dark brown hair, soft glam styling, and her face is intentionally covered by a centered soft-edged rectangular blur/censor block. She wears an oversized black hoodie with bright electric-blue LED piping and a large glowing Facebook “f” on the chest, a white cropped bandeau top with a small Facebook logo, loose white cargo jogger pants with straps, and white chunky sneakers with glowing blue LED soles. She sits casually on the cube with one leg bent and one foot hanging forward, holding a smartphone in her left hand, her right hand resting on the cube, projecting a confident influencer vibe. The cube is glossy translucent deep blue with neon edges and a large white glowing Facebook “f” on the front, sitting on a wet reflective floor with blue reflections, mist, bokeh city lights, and a dark futuristic social media ambience. Surround her with exactly 14 floating holographic social media UI elements: 1 Facebook friend requests panel in the upper left, 1 comments panel on the left, 1 new message panel at lower left, 1 blue follower count bubble reading “128”, 1 like count bubble reading “89”, 1 heart count bubble reading “376”, 1 notification bell bubble reading “36” near the top, 1 circular thumbs-up icon in the upper right, 1 post engagement analytics panel showing “45.8K”, “2.1K”, and “1.2K” with a line chart, 1 heart bubble reading “256”, 1 reactions panel listing Like, Love, Wow, Haha, Sad, Angry, 1 live card reading “Live 4.2K Watching”, 1 Messenger chat icon bubble, 1 outline heart icon, and 1 new follower card at lower right. Use crisp blue holographic panels, transparent glass UI, glowing outlines, realistic reflections, volumetric blue light, shallow depth of field, high-detail fashion photography, 85mm cinematic look, dramatic rim lighting, ultra-realistic textures, no watermark, no extra logos beyond Facebook-style branding. Customizable elements: stylish young female social media influencer, Facebook, electric neon blue, black LED hoodie, white crop top, white cargo joggers, glowing white sneakers, centered soft-edged rectangular blur/censor block.
